module_info.docstring:
P0 Regression Tests: Agent Name Validation.

These tests verify that agent name validation correctly:
1. Accepts valid adjective+noun combinations
2. Rejects invalid names (descriptive, program names, etc.)
3. Handles case insensitivity properly
4. Works correctly in registration and identity creation flows

Reference: mcp_agent_mail-2xf

classes.name: TestValidateAgentNameFormat
classes.docstring: Test the validate_agent_name_format() function from utils.py.

methods.name: test_valid_names_return_true
methods.docstring: Valid adjective+noun combinations should return True.

methods.name: test_all_adjective_noun_combinations_are_valid
methods.docstring: Sample of all possible adjective+noun combinations should be valid.

methods.name: test_partial_matches_return_false
methods.docstring: Partial matches (adjective or noun only) should return False.

classes.name: TestGenerateAgentName
classes.docstring: Test the generate_agent_name() function from utils.py.

methods.name: test_generated_names_are_valid
methods.docstring: All generated names should pass validation.

methods.name: test_generated_names_are_pascalcase
methods.docstring: Generated names should be in PascalCase format.

methods.name: test_generated_names_use_word_lists
methods.docstring: Generated names should use words from ADJECTIVES and NOUNS lists.

classes.name: TestSanitizeAgentName
classes.docstring: Test the sanitize_agent_name() function from utils.py.

methods.name: test_empty_after_cleanup_returns_none
methods.docstring: If nothing remains after cleanup, return None.

methods.name: test_truncates_long_names
methods.docstring: Names longer than 128 characters should be truncated.

classes.name: TestAgentNameEdgeCases
classes.docstring: Test edge cases in agent name handling.

methods.name: test_namespace_size
methods.docstring: Verify the namespace is large enough for practical use.

functions.name: test_register_agent_auto_generates_valid_name
functions.docstring: register_agent should auto-generate a valid name when name is omitted.

functions.name: test_register_agent_with_explicit_valid_name
functions.docstring: register_agent should accept explicit valid names.

functions.name: test_register_agent_case_insensitive_uniqueness
functions.docstring: Agent names should be case-insensitively unique.

functions.name: test_register_agent_coerces_invalid_descriptive_name
functions.docstring: In coerce mode (default), invalid names auto-generate valid ones.

functions.name: test_register_agent_coerces_program_name_as_agent
functions.docstring: In coerce mode, program names as agent names get auto-generated.

functions.name: test_register_agent_strict_rejects_invalid_descriptive_name
functions.docstring: In strict mode, register_agent should reject descriptive names.

functions.name: test_register_agent_strict_rejects_program_name_as_agent
functions.docstring: In strict mode, register_agent should reject program names as agent names.

functions.name: test_create_agent_identity_generates_unique_names
functions.docstring: create_agent_identity should generate unique valid names.

functions.name: test_create_agent_identity_with_valid_hint
functions.docstring: create_agent_identity should accept valid name hints.

functions.name: test_create_agent_identity_coerces_invalid_hint
functions.docstring: In coerce mode, create_agent_identity auto-generates for invalid hints.

functions.name: test_create_agent_identity_strict_rejects_invalid_hint
functions.docstring: In strict mode, create_agent_identity should reject invalid name hints.

functions.name: test_send_message_validates_recipient_names
functions.docstring: send_message should validate recipient agent names exist.

functions.name: test_send_message_with_valid_agents
functions.docstring: send_message should work with valid, registered agent names.
